title: Graaff-Reinet and surrounds to have 12hr power outage for Eskom maintenance
description: GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - There will be a power...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - There will be a power interruption in Graaff-Reinet and surrounding towns from 07:00 to 19:00 tomorrow, Thursday 13 March, affective the majority of the residents and businesses in these areas.","html":"GRAAFF-REINET NEWS - There will be a power interruption in Graaff-Reinet and surrounding towns from 07:00 to 19:00 tomorrow, Thursday 13 March, affective the majority of the residents and businesses in these areas."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Eskom will be conducting its three-yearly maintenance work on substations and clear defects on the power lines at Graaff-Reinet, Nieu-Bethesda, Hangklip, Aberdeen, Skietkop and Klipplaat."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"According to Dr Beyers Naudé Local Municipality, no guarantee can be given that the power interruption will last only for the given 12-hour period, and consumers must treat their installations as live during that whole time.","html":"According to Dr Beyers Naudé Local Municipality, no guarantee can be given that the power interruption will last only for the given 12-hour period, and consumers must treat their installations as live during that whole time."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Graaff-Reinet and surrounds to have 12hr power outage for Eskom maintenance
